predictions.title: World models will have their “ChatGPT moment”
predictions.description: Mainstream breakthrough for world models beyond synthetic demos.

updates.content: [2604.13035v1] SceneCritic: A Symbolic Evaluator for 3D Indoor Scene Synthesis
updates.reasoning: Introduces SceneCritic, a symbolic evaluator for 3D scene synthesis that provides object-level and relationship-level assessments, advancing the structural reliability of world model generation.

predictions.title: Non-language models will get more love
predictions.description: Momentum around action models and VLAs (Vision-Language-Action).

updates.content: [2604.13029v1] Visual Preference Optimization with Rubric Rewards
updates.reasoning: Introduces rDPO, a framework for visual preference optimization using instance-specific rubrics, significantly advancing multimodal reasoning beyond text-only language models.

updates.content: [2604.14149v1] One Token per Highly Selective Frame: Towards Extreme Compression for Long Video Understanding
updates.reasoning: Develops a novel compression paradigm (LP-Comp and QC-Comp) allowing VLMs to process long videos with significantly higher efficiency, pushing multimodal video understanding further.

predictions.title: Learning will become distributed
predictions.description: Agents continuously learning by observing and copying other agents.

updates.content: [2604.13018v1] Toward Autonomous Long-Horizon Engineering for ML Research
updates.reasoning: AiScientist uses a 'File-as-Bus' workspace to maintain state across long-horizon agentic tasks, a prerequisite for distributed agentic learning.

predictions.title: AI, control theory, and formal methods will converge
predictions.description: Intersection for verification, stability, and reliability of RL systems.

updates.content: [2604.13022v1] Classical and Quantum Speedups for Non-Convex Optimization via Energy Conserving Descent
updates.reasoning: Formulates Energy Conserving Descent as a global non-convex optimization method, explicitly bridging Hamiltonian physics (control theory) with machine learning optimization.

updates.content: [2604.14151v1] Visplot: A visibility plot and observation scheduling tool for astronomical observatories
updates.reasoning: Presents a tool that combines pre-allocation with multi-objective heuristic optimization, illustrating the convergence of formal constraints and control-based scheduling in real-world physical systems.

updates.content: [2604.15238v1] A Nonlinear Separation Principle: Applications to Neural Networks, Control and Learning
updates.reasoning: Establishes a nonlinear separation principle that guarantees global exponential stability for recurrent neural networks, directly bridging control theory with deep learning stability.

predictions.title: Prompt and context engineering will be abstracted away
predictions.description: Handled by prompt compilers and optimizers (desired-state programming).

updates.content: [2604.13016v1] Rethinking On-Policy Distillation of Large Language Models: Phenomenology, Mechanism, and Recipe
updates.reasoning: Investigates OPD as a paradigm to replace manual prompt/data reliance by distilling teacher models directly, effectively abstracting prompt engineering through automated distillation.

predictions.title: New distribution mechanisms for simple apps will emerge
predictions.description: Shipping vibes instead of code; on-demand customization.

updates.reasoning: PAL platform transforms lecture videos into interactive, personalized learning experiences on the fly, demonstrating on-demand customization of apps without manual coding.

updates.content: [2604.15309v1] MM-WebAgent: A Hierarchical Multimodal Web Agent for Webpage Generation
updates.reasoning: Demonstrates a hierarchical multimodal agent that generates UI/UX on demand, fulfilling the prediction of shipping dynamic application experiences rather than static code.

predictions.title: Collaboration will move beyond source-code versioning
predictions.description: Git evolving to version agent interactions and records of intent.

updates.content: [2604.13018v1] Toward Autonomous Long-Horizon Engineering for ML Research
updates.reasoning: Uses a 'File-as-Bus' workspace for long-horizon engineering, emphasizing durable artifacts (plans, analyses, code) as the atomic unit of collaboration rather than just source-code versioning.

updates.content: [2604.15140v1] DiscoTrace: Representing and Comparing Answering Strategies of Humans and LLMs in Information-Seeking Question Answering
updates.reasoning: Develops a methodology to record and represent the rhetorical and reasoning strategies of agents, which is a key step towards versioning records of intent and agent interaction processes.

predictions.title: AI-generated slop will raise the bar for quality
predictions.description: Differentiation shifts to taste, judgment, and intent as AI content floods.

updates.content: [2604.13035v1] SceneCritic: A Symbolic Evaluator for 3D Indoor Scene Synthesis
updates.reasoning: By using symbolic evaluators that outperform VLM judges, this work provides the high-quality feedback needed to move beyond 'slop' generation towards reliable, coherent content.

updates.content: [2604.14148v1] Seedance 2.0: Advancing Video Generation for World Complexity
updates.reasoning: New multimodal generation models like Seedance 2.0 continue to raise the bar for quality, driving the shift toward higher-standard content generation.

updates.content: [2604.15302v1] Diagnosing LLM Judge Reliability: Conformal Prediction Sets and Transitivity Violations
updates.reasoning: Addresses the reliability of 'LLM-as-a-judge' systems, a critical component for quality control in an era of abundant AI content, facilitating the raising of quality standards.

predictions.title: Intelligence will move from digital to physical
predictions.description: Intent automation in the physical world; designing/automating physical systems.

updates.content: [2604.13013v1] Bilevel Late Acceptance Hill Climbing for the Electric Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem
updates.reasoning: Optimizes physical vehicle routing through a bilevel framework, showing how intelligence can directly control and optimize complex physical-world logistics.

updates.content: [2604.15184v1] Agent-Aided Design for Dynamic CAD Models
updates.reasoning: Introduces agents that design real-world CAD objects, demonstrating the integration of generative AI directly into the physical design and automation pipeline.

predictions.title: Certifications for AI agents
predictions.description: Human-level certifications for agents replacing knowledge workers.

updates.content: [2604.13024v1] CLAD: Efficient Log Anomaly Detection Directly on Compressed Representations
updates.reasoning: Enables robust, high-performance anomaly detection directly on logs, providing the auditing and verification tools essential for certifying agent behavior in production environments.

updates.content: [2604.15236v1] Agentic Microphysics: A Manifesto for Generative AI Safety
updates.reasoning: Provides a rigorous safety framework for agentic systems, addressing the structured risks that arise from sustained interaction and tool use, foundational to establishing agent certifications.
